Everything was fine, the bathrooms were clean, but it's too expensive if you buy things at the convenience store.

reviews.comment:
Pará, pará! Una mañana muy temprano, filas de vehículos y solo un playero trabajando, que no sé si tenerle lástima o nada porque no me atendió bien (o sea, debe ser por todo el trabajo que tenía y la gente como yo podía mostrarse impaciente). A ver, yo perdí tiempo porque iba al aeropuerto, además la app de YPF no escaneaba el código QR y menos mal tenía una tarjeta par apagar. Y el playero por poco después me tira la tarjeta. Mala atención. Inviertan! Están sobre Ruta 9, el servicio no solo es para la localidad de Ojo de Agua. Jajaja.

(Translated by Google)
Wait, wait! One morning very early, lines of cars and only one attendant working, and I don't know whether to feel sorry for him or not because he didn't serve me well (I mean, it must be because he was so busy and people like me could be impatient). Look, I wasted time because I was going to the airport, plus the YPF app wasn't scanning the QR code, and luckily I had a card to pay. And the attendant almost threw the card away. Terrible service. Invest some money! You're on Route 9, the service isn't just for the town of Ojo de Agua. Hahaha.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxcUlQaHRRRRAB

A good drive-through gas station, the only downside is that it's way too expensive, way too expensive. The bathrooms are spotless.

reviews.comment:
Cómo siempre un lugar agradable en la ruta hacia el norte, su comedor muy bueno , las medias lunas como siempre muy ricas , los sanitarios impecables

(Translated by Google)
As always, a pleasant place on the route north, the dining room is very good, the croissants are as always delicious, and the restrooms are spotless.
